verdictSummary: Zero PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims emitted. The vast majority of candidate Mayo Clinic Florida USCE URLs resolved to system-level 404 pages and were correctly routed to HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED; remaining substantive claims are from mayoclinic.org/education and /medical-professionals (system/college scope) and were correctly held at HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED or FUTURE_LANE_ONLY rather than promoted to the Florida campus. Ledger is internally consistent; several A1/A2 duplicates noted for downstream dedupe.
unfollowedSignals: Visiting medical student clerkships / Elective clinical rotations for visiting medical students (mayoclinic.org/education) — system/college-level USCE signal exists but no campus-applicability proof for Mayo Clinic Florida

deepRecoveryTasks.reason: College-level visiting medical student clerkships are advertised at mayoclinic.org/education but no Mayo Clinic Florida campus-applicability proof or campus-specific page was captured.
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Targeted fetch of Mayo Clinic Alix School of Medicine visiting student pages and any Jacksonville/Florida campus-applicability roster to confirm whether Florida campus accepts visiting medical students.

deepRecoveryTasks.reason: Every observership-keyword URL returned a 404; no explicit Mayo Clinic Florida observership refusal quote was captured (absence rather than refusal).
deepRecoveryTasks.suggestedNarrowAction: Narrow search for an explicit Mayo Clinic / Mayo Clinic Florida observership policy statement (accept or do-not-accept), e.g. via Alix School of Medicine FAQ or international programs page.
